L

Label1 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Lines of text, (use all available space)
Label1Property - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
0 - Unchecked (default)
1 - Checked Relevant only if the ButtonType is “CheckBox”.
Label2 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Lines of text, (use all available space)
Label2Property - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
0 - Unchecked (default) 1 - Checked Relevant only if the ButtonType is “CheckBox”.
Label3 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Lines of text, (use all available space)
Label3Property - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
0 - Unchecked (default) 1 - Checked Relevant only if the ButtonType is “CheckBox”.
Label4 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Lines of text, (use all available space)
Label4Property - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
0 - Unchecked (default) 1 - Checked Relevant only if the ButtonType is “CheckBox”.

LineItemTotal - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
Unit cost multiplied by the quantity and less the discount per line item.
[Unit Price * Quantity]-Discount Per Line Item = Line Item Total.
